tweets.author: exitvelocitybtc.bsky.social
tweets.text: Agreed. Managing that trade-off requires diligence. If you'd put $100 into a S&P 500 index fund in 2016, it would be worth ~$250 today. The same $100 in Bitcoin would be ~$6,000. Preserving purchasing power is key.
